tasks.label: Build C++ (auto compiler)
tasks.command: $compiler = (Get-Command g++ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source; if (-not $compiler) { $compiler = (Get-Command clang++ -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).Source }; if ($compiler) { & $compiler -std=c++17 -Wall -Wextra -pedantic main.cpp -o main.exe; exit $LASTEXITCODE } elseif (Get-Command cl -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { cl /EHsc /nologo /Fe:main.exe main.cpp; exit $LASTEXITCODE } else { Write-Error 'No C++ compiler found. Install MSYS2/MinGW (g++) or Visual Studio Build Tools.'; exit 1 }
